title: AXModalOptions
description: Configuration options for modal dialogs that extend overlay options with modal-specific features.

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Modal options interface extending overlay options.

props.name: title
props.description: Title displayed in the modal header.

props.name: buttons.minimize.enable
props.description: Whether to show the minimize button.

props.name: buttons.minimize.position
props.description: Position of minimized modal in the bottom bar.

props.name: buttons.maximize
props.description: Whether to show the maximize button.

props.name: buttons.close
props.description: Whether to show the close button in header.

props.name: draggable
props.description: Whether the modal can be dragged around the screen.

props.name: header
props.description: Whether to show the modal header.

props.name: footer
props.description: Whether to show the modal footer.

props.name: inputs
props.description: Input values for the modal content component inherited from AXOverlayOptions.
